nodes.text: You leave your apartment and ride your bicycle, still stressed from this mornings disaster.
It was eerie on the other side of town. And passing up a more vague sign..

nodes.speaker: Sebastian
nodes.text: [i]What? What'd that sign say? God, last thing I need is for there to be road work...[/i]
suddenly, a figure of a little boy appears in front of you. Did you take your meds?
